productDisplayName: Force 10 Men White & Navy Blue Shoes
description: Style NoteSporty fashion never looked this good! This pair of performance oriented force 10 shoes is the right choice to complement your casual weekend wear. The brand's shoes have always made the cut when it comes to off-duty dressing - this pair refines that look for you. Product DetailsWhite round toed shoe with black and navy blue trims, perforations on the forefoot and midfoot regionHas central lace-ups, padded inner and tongue with nubuck overlays at the toe and heel Has a tough rubber midsole and a TPU outsolePointed conical nubs all over the outsole with exaggerated herringbone grooves and pivot points at the forefoot regionMaterial and CareSynthetic, nubuckWipe with clean dry cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
